mapper.select: SELECT ref_type AS category, ref_id AS refId, title, subtext, content, MATCH(title, subtext, content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) AS score FROM search_index WHERE MATCH(title, subtext, content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) ORDER BY score DESC;

SELECT ref_type AS category, ref_id AS refId, title, subtext, content, 0 AS score FROM search_index WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR subtext LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO search_index (ref_type, ref_id, title, subtext, content, created_at) VALUES (#{refType}, #{refId}, #{title}, #{subtext}, #{content}, NOW())
